summary: v5 Correspondence feature verified end-to-end. Backend: /app/backend/tests/backend_test_v5.py — 8/8 passing (seed returns 4 emails ordered 1..4 with correct audiences and Awardee subject, no _id leak, POST/PUT/DELETE all require admin (401 without token), full CRUD roundtrip via admin token works and count returns to 4 after delete). Frontend: Correspondence page loads at /correspondence with exactly 4 email cards; audience badges match Awardee, Nominator (selected), Nominator (rejected), Awardee (post-acceptance); 15 placeholder pills rendered as spans with class containing 'bg-[#EAF1F9]'; Copy button writes 'Subject: ... \n\n<body>' to clipboard (intercepted via writeText hook — 1616 chars, starts with 'Subject: Congratulations! You've Been Selected...') and toggles to 'Copied' state. Home page section-card-correspondence links to /correspondence. Nav 'Correspondence' link (data-testid nav-correspondence) navigates correctly. Admin panel (logged in via PIN passcode Spotlight2025) shows a 'Correspondence' tab (data-testid admin-tab-emails). Adding a new template via GenericAdmin form persists — Correspondence page grows 4→5 with the new card; deleting via admin-del-emails-<id> restores count to 4.
critical_code_review_comments: Note on review request wording: it claims admin login uses email+password (cochair@theblueprint.com / Spotlight2025). The frontend /login page actually only exposes a passcode/PIN input (POST /api/auth/pin with {password: 'Spotlight2025'}). The email+password (POST /api/auth/login) endpoint is available and works with those credentials, but the UI login form is passcode-only. Not a bug — just a documentation mismatch in the review request.

Correspondence.jsx: clipboard.writeText may reject in cross-origin iframes / older browsers with no fallback (only a toast.error is shown). Consider adding a hidden textarea + document.execCommand('copy') fallback.
Correspondence.jsx: no loading / empty-state UI; while SWR fetches, the page renders empty grid silently. Consider a skeleton or an empty-state message when data is truly empty.

server.py POST /api/emails: no unique constraint on order — two seed templates could end up with the same order value after admin edits; sort remains stable-ish, but consider warning admins in the UI.
test_credentials: PIN: Spotlight2025 (via /api/auth/pin). Email login also works: cochair@theblueprint.com / Spotlight2025.
seed_data_creation: None persisted — one TEST_E1_CORR_ROW template was created via admin and deleted in the same run; DB count returned to 4.
context_for_next_testing_agent: v5 backend regression: /app/backend/tests/backend_test_v5.py (8 tests, needs REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL env). v4 tests still in /app/backend/tests/backend_test_v4.py (13 tests, still green). Key v5 testids: email-card-<id>, email-copy-<id>, nav-correspondence, section-card-correspondence, admin-tab-emails, admin-add-emails, admin-del-emails-<id>. GenericAdmin form for emails uses generic <input>/<textarea> without per-field testids — fill by <label> text ('order', 'audience', 'title', 'when', 'subject', 'email body'). Clipboard testing: grant permissions with context.grant_permissions(['clipboard-read','clipboard-write']) and hook navigator.clipboard.writeText to window.__lastCopy.
